mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_session(public_session_id, user_id, session_title, status) VALUES(#{publicSessionId}, #{userId}, #{sessionTitle}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_chat_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_message(session_id, role, content, message_type, extra_json) VALUES(#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{extraJson})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, role, content, message_type, extra_json, created_at FROM ai_chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, session_id, role, content, message_type, extra_json, created_at FROM ai_chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND role = 'ASSISTANT' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_recommendation_record(session_id, user_id, query_text, parsed_condition_json, recommended_flight_ids, search_url) VALUES(#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{queryText}, #{parsedConditionJson}, #{recommendedFlightIds}, #{searchUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM ai_chat_session WHERE public_session_id = #{publicSessionId}
